text.title: E2E-to-Contract Migration Recipe Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply E2E-to-Contract Migration Recipe end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: baseline
step.action: Measure duration_sec + flake_rate_per_week per candidate case; record in spec.

step.name: extract-schema
step.action: Lift the request + response shape into a schema file (OpenAPI, JSON Schema, Protobuf); commit.

step.name: provider-tests
step.action: Generate provider-side contract tests; assert provider matches schema.

step.name: consumer-tests
step.action: Generate consumer-side stubs; replace ad-hoc mocks; assert consumer parses schema-shaped responses.

step.name: migrate-cases
step.action: Remove the migrated e2e case from suite OR mark `@contract-covered` and drop from default run.

step.name: re-measure
step.action: Capture duration_sec + flake_rate_per_week; record in post_metrics.

step.name: emit-spec
step.action: Write artefact JSON; declare rollback_plan; status=ready_for_review.
